description: Analyze any video (file, URL, or Jira attachment) into frames + transcript for Claude Code
name: io.github.KitDevUA/video-vision-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to a .env file with config (Jira creds, API keys).
environmentVariables.name: VIDEO_MCP_ENV

environmentVariables.description: Enables tier-3 native Gemini video analysis (default when set).
environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Jira base URL — only for the jira_issue_key input path.
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_URL

environmentVariables.description: Jira account email — only for the jira_issue_key input path.
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Jira API token — only for the jira_issue_key input path.
environmentVariables.name: JIRA_API_TOKEN
